svg.title: Sharveesh M AI systems profile dashboard
svg.desc: A premium neon systems dashboard for Sharveesh M featuring AI systems engineering, HELIOS, Midas Pay, Whole2, technology stack, timeline, contribution activity, and quick links.

g.text: AI Engineer • Systems Builder • Full-Stack Developer
Building intelligent systems that think, adapt, and scale.
I design, ship and operate AI-driven platforms, agentic systems,
and scalable architectures that solve real-world problems.
I don’t just write code. I architect systems that evolve.
